      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, roc_curve, auc, classification_report\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. GENERATE FAST DATA\n",
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "n = 1000\n",
        "data = {\n",
        "    'Tenure': np.random.randint(1, 72, n),\n",
        "    'MonthlyCharges': np.random.uniform(20, 120, n),\n",
        "    'Contract': np.random.choice([0, 1, 2], n), # 0: Month-to-month, 1: 1yr, 2: 2yr\n",
        "    'Churn': np.random.choice([0, 1], n, p=[0.7, 0.3])\n",
        "}\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame(data)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. TRAIN MODEL\n",
        "X = df.drop('Churn', axis=1)\n",
        "y = df['Churn']\n",
        "X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "model = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=100)\n",
        "model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. PREDICT\n",
        "y_probs = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]\n",
        "y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. PLOT RESULTS\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(16, 5))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot A: Importance\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 1)\n",
        "sns.barplot(x=model.feature_importances_, y=X.columns, palette='viridis', hue=X.columns, legend=False)\n",
        "plt.title('Why are they leaving? (Features)')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot B: Confusion Matrix\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 2)\n",
        "sns.heatmap(confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred), annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Reds')\n",
        "plt.title('Predictions vs Reality')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Plot C: ROC Curve\n",
        "fpr, tpr, _ = roc_curve(y_test, y_probs)\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 3, 3)\n",
        "plt.plot(fpr, tpr, label=f'AUC: {auc(fpr, tpr):.2f}', color='darkblue')\n",
        "plt.plot([0, 1], [0, 1], '--', color='gray')\n",
        "plt.title('Model Power (ROC)')\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
